title: FTB Quest Localizer
description: A Mod to export FTB Quests into Lang Files for easier translation
body:
A Mod to export FTB Quests into Lang Files for easier translation ### **Q&A Link:[Discord](https://discord.gg/Rv54qzXRye)** ### **Logo Thanks:** YeraX7 and ActiveRadar ### Please use latest version!!! ## How to use **Use `/ftblang export (FTBQuestorginalLangCode)` for example `/ftblang export zh_cn`** ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1071737/description_ec6d4d72-98b4-49df-8dc5-fea12eb3da45.png) **Then you can see this export path:** ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1071737/description_0707641b-a493-43e6-a829-594c89c32a83.png) Don't delete FTBLang folder **And this command will also automatically replace the `ftbquest` folder and automatically add the `kubejs` folder in `config` folder and `.minecraft` folder** ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1071737/description_e83583b5-4180-47f4-aeae-8aa84a40a5e3.png) _If you don't have kubeJs mod kubejs folder is useless_ **Then all you have to do is rename the language file`en_us.json` to the language you want and translate it** ## For example: **Translate English to Chinese** **Before:** ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1071737/description_27bd15da-2a2c-444f-9878-c7649856fa8d.png) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1071737/description_c59a6c56-d80f-42f3-82f1-86aa2f5f0878.png) **After:** ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1071737/description_7cb5d4ce-b738-4c39-94a4-8dc04cb016e3.png) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1071737/description_0150c219-6ead-45a2-95ed-d278e5b3fdec.png)
Spoiler
